Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Enosh Travelers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Enosh Travelers aim to destroy the Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Enosh Travelers killed Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — The Enosh Travelers use floating crystals that spin like wagon wheels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — The Enosh Travelers and soldiers remained silent while Valin addressed the people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Enosh Travelers treated Alin with respect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — The Nye were following the Enosh Travelers in attacking anything wearing a Damascan uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Most of the Enosh Travelers were dead or had fled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Enosh Travelers filed through the Gate to the Crimson Vault.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
